user_goal: Dashboard integration test: solid electrolyte ionic conductivity vs temperature for battery research

parsed_goal.objective: Dashboard integration test: solid electrolyte ionic conductivity vs temperature for battery research

studies.title: Enhanced ionic conductivity in transition-metal doped LLZO
studies.finding: Fe doping at 3-5 mol% improved conductivity in reported conditions.
studies.methodology: Estimated methodology: controlled doping experiment with impedance characterization.
studies.findings: Estimated finding: conductivity improvement observed near moderate dopant levels.
studies.limitations: Estimated limitation: generalized from summary metadata, not full protocol.
studies.equipment_estimate: Estimated equipment: furnace, XRD, impedance analyzer.
studies.funding_estimate: Estimated funding: mid-size materials science grant support.

studies.title: Stability limits of doped garnet electrolytes above 250C
studies.finding: Some doped samples show decomposition above 250C.
studies.methodology: Estimated methodology: high-temperature cycling and structure verification.
studies.findings: Estimated finding: stability risk increases at upper temperature range.
studies.limitations: Estimated limitation: condition range may not cover all compositions.
studies.equipment_estimate: Estimated equipment: thermal chamber and diffraction instrumentation.
studies.funding_estimate: Estimated funding: public academic grant support.

studies.title: Systematic Fe concentration sweep in LLZO
studies.finding: Gap: no high-resolution concentration sweep around 3-7 mol%.
studies.methodology: Estimated methodology: planned concentration sweep with repeated measurements.
studies.findings: Estimated finding: unresolved optimum concentration in mid-range intervals.
studies.equipment_estimate: Estimated equipment: synthesis and electrochemical characterization suite.
studies.funding_estimate: Estimated funding: pre-award estimate pending study execution.

prior_work.gap: Intermediate conditions and boundary stability remain under-sampled.

claim_graph.main_claim: Targeted doping can improve the target property while preserving stability.
claim_graph.weakest_claim: Performance gains persist under stricter boundary conditions.
claim_graph.next_target: Test boundary condition where stability uncertainty is highest.

compiler.target_claim: Performance gains persist under stricter boundary conditions.

results.inference: Candidate region likely exists where improvement and stability are both satisfied.
results.uncertainty: Boundary between pass/fail conditions remains unresolved.

next_experiment.recommendation: Boundary screen around the current best-performing region.
